Available Exam Positions

Browse the most important Loksewa positions, grouped by level and service so you can jump directly to the track you need.

Assistant

खरिदार

Kharidar

Non-Gazetted 2nd Class · Level 4

Practical computer test plus interview for shortlisted candidates.
न्यायप्रशासनलेखासंसद
Papers

3

Competition

extreme

न्याय / Judicial Service100,000–150,000 applicants per cycle
Assistant

नायब सुब्बा

NaSu / Nayab Subba

Non-Gazetted 1st Class · Level 5

Written exam followed by interview for the unified and integrated exam system.
प्रशासनलेखान्यायसंसद
Papers

3

Competition

high

प्रशासन / General AdministrationHighly competitive with limited annual openings
Officer

शाखा अधिकृत

Section Officer

Gazetted 3rd Class · Level 7/8

Service-wise interview and document verification stage.
प्रशासनलेखापरराष्ट्रसंसद
Papers

4

Competition

extreme

प्रशासन / General AdministrationModerate openings, very high merit pressure
Officer

शाखा अधिकृत

Section Officer - Accounts / Audit

Gazetted 3rd Class · Level 7/8

Written exam plus interview focused on financial administration and control.
लेखा
Papers

4

Competition

high

लेखा / Audit & AccountsService-specific annual openings
Officer

शाखा अधिकृत

Section Officer - Foreign Affairs

Gazetted 3rd Class · Level 7/8

Written exam plus interview with emphasis on diplomacy and international issues.
परराष्ट्र
Papers

4

Competition

extreme

परराष्ट्र / Foreign AffairsVery limited openings
Officer

शाखा अधिकृत

Section Officer - Administration

Gazetted 3rd Class · Level 7/8

Interview and document verification for administrative service placement.
प्रशासन
Papers

4

Competition

high

प्रशासन / General AdministrationService-specific annual openings

Study Materials

Open the syllabus, exam notes, and guided study paths for the most searched preparation tracks.

kharidar

खरिदार

Kharidar

Paper 1 is qualifying; final selection depends on combined written, computer skill, and interview performance.

Open exam
nasu

नायब सुब्बा

NaSu / Nayab Subba

Paper 1 is qualifying in the integrated exam structure; service-specific merit follows the written and interview stages.

Open exam
sakha-adhikrit

शाखा अधिकृत

Section Officer

New 2081/82 rule: Paper 1 passing score is 45/100 and Paper 1 marks are not merged into the Paper 2 total.

Open exam
